_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate (with line_items=list[CostLine] populated from takeoff items pre-pricing)

refresh_history.note: Refreshed against full 38-sheet drawing set + 796-page Project Manual + Addenda #1 (pre-response meeting), Drawings Addenda 1 + 2. Quantities now anchored to AF100 Room Finish Schedule (3,115 SF Grand Total). CSI sections corrected to actual Project Manual section numbers.

_meta.owner: Angelo State University (member of the Texas Tech University System)
_meta.owner_primary_procurement_poc: Hannah Bignall, Assistant Director of Contracted Services, ASU FP&C — hannah.bignall@angelo.edu, 325-942-2380
_meta.owner_pm: Samuel Guevara, Associate Director, ASU Facilities Planning & Construction — samuel.guevara@angelo.edu, 325-942-2380
_meta.owner_fp_c_director: Tracie Howell, Director of Facilities Services
_meta.ae_architect: PBK Architects, Inc. (TX Reg. Firm BR-1608), 601 NW Loop 410 Suite 400, San Antonio, TX 78216 — 210-829-0123. R.A. of Record: Clifford Whittingstall #18585. PBK Project No. 250402.
_meta.ae_structural: Lundy & Franke Engineering, 549 Heimer, San Antonio, TX 78232 — 210-979-7900
_meta.location: Carr Education and Fine Arts Building, 2602 Dena Dr / ASU Station #10924, San Angelo, TX 76909 (Tom Green County)
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Tom Green County / San Angelo typically clears at ~0.88-0.93 of the national RSMeans City Cost Index. Carry 1.0 until confirmed with current RSMeans CCI lookup for San Angelo 76909. Apply Tom Green County prevailing wage as the labor floor per prevailing-wages.md.
_meta.contingency_pct_note: Lowered from 8% to 7% on 2026-05-23 because we now have full docs + competitor list; the contingency was previously padded for document risk. Bump back to 9-10% if site walk reveals existing-conditions surprises OR if Section 00 31 00 hazmat survey is not provided.
_meta.profit_pct_note: Institutional TX state-work norm. Drop to 5% if pricing competitiveness is the differentiating factor against the 4 known competitors (Ardent United, JAJ Property Services, Onyx Solutions, Collier Const.); raise to 7% if a strong past-performance / HSP narrative gives us margin headroom.
_meta.owner_furnished_allowance_note: Per Attachment A + PM Sec 01 21 00 — the $25,000 cash/contingency allowance for unforeseen scope. Carried as a SEPARATE line on the proposal form; NOT rolled into the base price; NOT marked up. Expect ~$15K to absorb hazmat-encounter remediation if any.
_meta.verified_project_area_basis: AF100 Room Finish Schedule Grand Total. Room-by-room: 1R9 159 + 1R10 160 + 101 (Corridor) 641 + 104 (Mech) 61 + 105 (Elevator) 68 + 106 (Front Entry) 1,098 + 107 (Green Room) 222 + 108 (Makeup Room) 434 + 109 (Women's Dressing) 135 + 110 (Men's Dressing) 136 = 3,115 SF.
_meta.headline_psf_range_usd: $135 - $190 / SF averaged across the 3,115 SF (back-of-house volume is denser at $200-$280/SF; circulation/entry is lighter at $50-$100/SF; see price-references.md)
owner_furnished_scope_excluded_from_pric: Fire suppression system — Div 21 NOT USED in PM TOC; fully owner-furnished
Technology systems (AV, performer comm, classroom AV)
Network / data cabling and termination (PATHWAY IS in our scope per PM Sec 27 00 00 / 27 05 00; the cable + termination per Sec 27 10 00 needs clarification from Hannah Bignall)
Equipment install (any equipment installed in dressing rooms post-construction)
CBORD access-control devices (readers, controllers, electric strikes) — door prep + pathway + power IS in our scope per PM Sec 08 71 00 + 26 05 34 + 27 05 00; the devices themselves are NOT
_meta.owner_furnished_correction_2026_05_23: Lockers (PM Sec 10 51 13) ARE in contractor scope — earlier prep-doc assumed owner-furnished but the PM has a dedicated locker spec. Verify exact qty on A-401 + A-901.
long_lead_items_flag: Mirror surrounds with theater LED — 8-12 weeks
Shower receptors + accessories (per Add 2 2x2 mosaic) — 6-8 weeks
Dimmable LED lighting + Distributed Digital Lighting Control per Sec 26 09 43 — 8-12 weeks
_meta.fill_instructions: Each item below carries unit + quantity sourced from drawings where the drawing is unambiguous. Items still marked quantity=null carry a notes field explaining what to verify on the site walk or what sheet to cross-reference. When pricing: replace quantity with the measured number; verify unit matches the cost-DB unit (mismatches will be suppressed per CALIBRATION_REPORT v3 fix C); update source_sheet_ids with the drawing sheet that backs the takeoff; re-run core.estimator.price_takeoff or hand-price each line. Items tagged 'OWNER-FURNISHED' have quantity=0 and unit_cost=0.0 by design — they exist for completeness and audit.

line_items.description: General conditions / project supervision (PM + super + project engineer for ~4-month NTP 7/1/2026 to substantial completion 11/2/2026)
line_items.notes: 4 MO @ $12,000-$15,000/mo for active-building coordination overhead. Per Addendum #1 slide 8: NTP 7/1, Sub Comp 11/2 = 124 days.

line_items.description: Temporary facilities and controls (dust containment w/ negative-air, sound mitigation, walk-off mats, dumpster, portable toilet)
line_items.notes: $10K-$15K LS for active performing-arts building with negative-air containment + sound mitigation + EHS-coordinated shutdowns. Per PM Sec 01 35 16 Alteration Project Procedures.

line_items.description: Commissioning support (contractor effort to support owner Cx authority — submittals, witness testing, training)
line_items.notes: Carry $3K-$6K for contractor Cx-support hours. Cx authority is likely owner-furnished but contractor must support per Cx specifications.

line_items.description: Project closeout — O&M manuals, attic stock, owner training, record drawings, AIA G706/G706A/G707 affidavits
line_items.notes: $3,500-$6,500 LS for ASU/TTUS-spec closeout deliverables incl. attic stock per Sec 01 78 23 + record docs per Sec 01 78 39.

line_items.description: Selective interior demolition — full strip of dressing-suite back-of-house (107/108/109/110/1R9/1R10 = 1,047 SF) including finishes, casework, ceilings, MEP rough-ins
line_items.notes: $8-$14/SF for MEP-included strip in active building. Salvage corridor 2x4 light fixtures separately per Add 2 (next line).

line_items.description: Selective demolition — corridor 101 (641 SF) finish-only (wallpaper retention partial per AF100; salvage existing 2x4 light fixtures for re-use in Makeup Room 108 per Drawings Add 2)
line_items.notes: $3-$5/SF for light finish-touch + salvage labor. Add $500-$1,200 for careful demo + crate + interim storage of salvaged fixtures (4-8 EA per site verify).

line_items.description: Selective demolition — Front Entry 106 (1,098 SF) carpet/floor demo only; wall finishes existing-to-remain per AF100
line_items.notes: $2-$4/SF carpet/flooring demo + base removal only.

line_items.description: Asbestos / Lead / PCB remediation allowance — contingent per PM Div 02 sections 02 82 00 / 02 83 00 / 02 87 13
source_sheet_ids: PM Sec 00 31 00 (Available Project Information — REFERENCED but NOT YET RECEIVED)
line_items.notes: $15K allowance carried within the $25K Attachment A cash/contingency until Section 00 31 00 hazmat survey is received from Hannah Bignall. Carr EFA is older construction — assume modest VCT/mastic/insulation risk. Disclose in proposal Assumptions & Clarifications.

line_items.description: Rough carpentry — plywood blocking behind GWB at all mirror, vanity, locker, grab bar, signage, TV mount, CBORD reader, and accessory mounts
line_items.notes: Estimate 250-400 SF of 2x or 3/4-inch PT plywood blocking; verify on A-401/A-501/A-901 cross-section details.

line_items.description: Finish carpentry — HPB hardwood base (4-inch H x 1-inch D, stain-to-match-existing) in Green Room 107
source_sheet_ids: AF100 Finish Schedule (HPB callout at Room 107)
line_items.notes: Perimeter of Green Room 107 (222 SF) ~ 60-70 LF. Verify on A-401. Carry $16-$25/LF stain-grade hardwood base installed.

line_items.description: Vanity countertops (PLAM) + LED-lit mirror surrounds at three (3) stations: Makeup Room 108, Women's Dressing 109, Men's Dressing 110
source_sheet_ids: Drawings Addendum 1 (24x72 mirror size, vanity outlets)
line_items.notes: Estimate 24-30 LF total vanity (8-10 LF per room). $550-$750/LF theater-grade with LED mirror surround per Add 1. LONG LEAD (8-12 weeks).

line_items.description: Hollow metal door frames
line_items.notes: Verify per A-801 door schedule (4-10 EA range; depends on which existing frames are reused).

line_items.description: Flush wood doors (solid-core, paint or stain grade per A-801)
line_items.notes: Match HM frame count.

line_items.description: Access doors and panels (MEP access in plenum / chases)
line_items.notes: 2-6 EA typical for renovation; verify on MEP RCPs.

line_items.description: Door hardware sets (Sargent cylindrical locksets + closers + kick plates + silencers + stops; storeroom or classroom function per A-801)
line_items.notes: $550-$750/EA hardware set for Sargent at institutional spec. CBORD door prep included for relevant doors. LONG LEAD (6-10 weeks).

line_items.description: Mirrors — large dressing-room mirrors at vanity stations + ADA lavatory mirrors at restrooms; per Add 1 mirror size 24x72
line_items.notes: 6-10 EA: 3 vanity-station mirrors (24x72) + 2 ADA RR mirrors + spare. $350-$550/EA depending on size + safety backing.

line_items.description: Gypsum board assemblies — non-structural metal stud framing + 5/8" Type X GWB at new partitions; moisture-resistant in 1R9/1R10
line_items.notes: ~600-900 SF new GWB (both faces of new partitions + furring at existing walls). Verify per A-401.

line_items.description: Tiling — floor T1 (porcelain) in back-of-house dressing/RR/Makeup spaces
Tiling — wall T2 (blue accent) + T3 (ridged white) at restrooms 1R9 + 1R10
source_sheet_ids: AF100 Wall Finish Legend (T2 + T3 callouts)
line_items.notes: ~250-400 SF combined; verify per A-501 RR elevations. $14-$22/SF installed.

line_items.description: Tiling — shower mosaic T4 (2x2) per Drawings Addendum 2 in shower receptors of both restrooms
line_items.notes: Estimate ~140 SF (2 showers x ~70 SF wet area each incl. floor + walls to height). $28-$40/SF installed incl. Schluter Kerdi waterproof membrane. LONG LEAD on specialty mosaic (4-8 weeks).

line_items.description: Acoustical ceilings (ACS1 grid + ACP1 panel) in 107/108/109/110/1R9/1R10 (~1,047 SF)
line_items.notes: 2x2 lay-in white grid + acoustic panel. $6-$9/SF including grid + panel. Existing-to-remain in 101 + 106 per AF100.

line_items.description: Resilient base — 4-inch rubber base (RB1) at perimeter of corridor 101 + non-tile rooms
line_items.notes: Estimate 200-300 LF; verify per AF100 + A-401.

line_items.description: Carpet tile (CPT1) — Front Entry 106 + Corridor 101 partial
line_items.notes: Estimate 1,000-1,500 SF (Front Entry 1,098 + some corridor). Verify per AF100. $5-$9/SF installed.

line_items.description: Painting — walls (P1 white field) + door frames (P2) + ceiling paint where GWB; per PM Sec 01 61 16 low-VOC
line_items.notes: Estimate ~2,500-3,500 SF wall paint + door frames. $1.65-$2.50/SF for walls.

line_items.description: Room signage — ADA-compliant (raised characters + Braille) per ASU wayfinding standard
line_items.notes: Estimate 8-10 EA; one per renovated room + corridor wayfinding. $95-$145/EA installed.

line_items.description: Phenolic-core toilet compartments (FTC) in restrooms 1R9 + 1R10 per AF100 finish-key FTC
line_items.notes: Estimate 4-6 stalls + 2 urinal screens; verify on A-501. $1,500-$2,200/stall installed.

line_items.description: Wall and door protection — CG1 stainless surface-mounted corner guards (full-height per AF100 spec)
source_sheet_ids: AF100 (17 CG1 callouts directly counted + ~7 more typical for corridor + RRs)
line_items.notes: AF100 shows CG1 callout 17 times directly. Add ~7 more typical for restroom + corridor + entry transitions = 24 EA estimate. $85-$140/EA installed.

line_items.description: Wall and door protection — PWC protective wall covering (4'-6' high in high-traffic walls)
line_items.notes: Estimate 150-250 SF behind costume racks / equipment lanes; verify on A-501.

line_items.description: Toilet accessories — grab bars, paper holders, soap dispensers, lavatory shelves, ADA-compliant
line_items.notes: 2 full RR accessory sets (1R9 + 1R10). $750-$1,200/RR set installed.

line_items.description: Metal lockers (institutional steel) — UPDATED 2026-05-23: contractor scope per PM Sec 10 51 13 (was previously assumed owner-furnished)
line_items.notes: If shown on A-401/A-901 in dressing rooms 109 + 110 + Green Room 107: estimate 8-24 lockers total. $425-$650/locker installed for institutional steel. LONG LEAD (8-12 weeks). Verify exact qty on site walk + A-401.

line_items.description: Wall-mounted standards and shelving (costume storage in Green Room 107 or wherever shown)
line_items.notes: Verify on A-401 — likely 1-2 wall systems of adjustable standards.

line_items.description: Residential appliances — TV mount + receptacle in Makeup Room 108 per Drawings Addendum 1 (TV likely owner-furnished; verify)
line_items.notes: 1 TV mount + low-voltage data pathway (TV likely owner-furnished; confirm with Hannah Bignall). Pathway in Div 26 / Div 27.

line_items.description: Plumbing fixtures — ADA wall-hung lavatories
line_items.notes: Estimate 4-8 EA (2 per RR + possibly at vanity stations); verify on P-501. $1,200-$1,850/EA installed.

line_items.description: Plumbing fixtures — ADA water closets (floor-mounted) in 1R9 + 1R10
line_items.notes: Estimate 2-4 EA; verify on P-501. $900-$1,500/EA installed.

line_items.description: Plumbing fixtures — ADA urinal in Men's RR 1R10
line_items.notes: $700-$1,100/EA installed.

line_items.description: Plumbing fixtures — ADA shower stalls per Drawings Addendum 2 (2x2 mosaic spec 09 30 00.T4 in receptors)
line_items.notes: 2 ADA showers (1R9 + 1R10), 32x60 or 36x60 receptors, thermostatic mixing valves, grab bars, slip-resistant. $5,500-$8,500/EA installed including waterproof membrane (Schluter Kerdi) + mosaic tile (priced separately in Div 09) + fixtures. LONG LEAD on receptors + valves (6-8 weeks).

line_items.description: Domestic water piping — supply branches to all new/modified fixtures
line_items.notes: Match fixture count above. Coordinate with existing risers.

line_items.description: Sanitary waste and vent piping
line_items.notes: Tie into existing risers. Coordinate with PD-101 demo cut-out.

line_items.description: Commissioning of plumbing systems — TAB + drain witness
HVAC metal ducts — supply + return + exhaust to back-of-house ~1,047 SF (existing-to-remain in 106)
line_items.notes: Estimate 1,500-2,200 LF total; verify per M-101A.

line_items.description: Air duct accessories — VDs, fire/smoke dampers, access doors
line_items.notes: Included in HVAC sub package.

line_items.description: HVAC exhaust fans (hair/makeup chemical vapors + restroom exhaust)
Diffusers, registers, grilles
line_items.notes: 25-40 EA total across all rooms.

line_items.description: Duct insulation — fiberglass wrap on supply + acoustic liner where called
line_items.notes: Match supply ductwork LF.

line_items.description: Testing, adjusting, and balancing (TAB) — independent NEBB/AABC-certified agency
line_items.notes: $3,500-$8,500 range for this size of system.

line_items.description: Integrated automation control (DDC tie-in to ASU BMS) — included in HVAC sub package
line_items.notes: TTUS standard (likely Siemens or Automated Logic — confirm). Included in mech sub.

line_items.description: Electrical common work + raceways + conductors + grounding + identification for 3,115 SF reno
line_items.notes: Includes power for owner-furnished CBORD readers + AV equipment + TV mount per Add 1 + Add 2 emergency lighting.

line_items.description: Wiring devices — receptacles + switches + GFCI in wet zones + dedicated 20A at vanity stations + TV outlet per Add 1
line_items.notes: Estimate 60-90 EA devices.

line_items.description: Lighting — general LED fixtures + 8" can lights in corridor per Add 2 + makeup mirror surrounds at 3 vanity stations
line_items.notes: Estimate 25-40 EA new + 4-8 EA salvage-reinstall from corridor (per Add 2). $350-$650/EA for dimmable LED. Mirror surrounds priced in Div 12 millwork. LONG LEAD on dimmable LED + DDLC (8-12 weeks).

line_items.description: Emergency lighting added in corridor 101 per Drawings Addendum 2
line_items.notes: 4-8 EA EM-mode LED with battery backup OR central-inverter feed.

line_items.description: Lighting controls — occupancy + manual override + dimming devices
line_items.notes: Per ASU energy standard.

line_items.description: Distributed Digital Lighting Control System (DDLC) — system-wide controllers per PM
line_items.notes: Included in electrical sub. LONG LEAD (8-12 weeks).

line_items.description: Electrical distribution equipment — sub-panel addition for new dressing-room loads (if existing panel insufficient)
line_items.notes: 0-1 EA; verify existing panel capacity on site walk. $5,500-$8,500/EA institutional 200A sub-panel.

line_items.description: Commissioning of electrical systems
Communications pathway — conduit + back-boxes + faceplate openings for data/AV/CBORD
line_items.notes: Estimate 20-30 outlets at $125-$250/EA pathway only. Cable + termination per Sec 27 10 00 ambiguity — see clarification request in outreach email to Hannah Bignall.

line_items.description: Structured cabling system (per PM Sec 27 10 00) — ALTERNATE LINE pending clarification with Hannah Bignall whether owner cabling vendor handles or contractor responsible
line_items.notes: DEFAULT 0 (assumed owner-furnished cabling vendor) UNTIL CLARIFIED. If contractor responsible, add $200-$400/EA outlet for full pull + terminate.

line_items.description: Fire detection and notification system — device relocation + new addressable devices
line_items.notes: Estimate 6-12 EA devices; $450-$750/EA for new device + tie-in to existing FA panel. EHS-coordinated shutdown windows required.

line_items.description: Fire suppression (sprinkler-head relocation + FP main modifications)
line_items.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED — confirmed in PM TOC (Div 21 NOT USED) + RFCSP. Carry zero.

line_items.description: CBORD access-control devices (readers, controllers, electric strikes)
line_items.notes: OWNER-FURNISHED. We provide door prep (Div 08 71 00) + low-voltage pathway (Div 27) + 120V (Div 26). The devices themselves are owner-furnished, owner-installed.

line_items.description: AV / data cabling termination + faceplate jacks (if cable is owner-furnished per the default assumption)
line_items.notes: DEFAULT OWNER-FURNISHED. We provide pathway only. Reclassify if Hannah Bignall confirms contractor responsibility for Sec 27 10 00.

_unsuppressed_summary.note: Subtotal / contingency / overhead / profit / grand_total all currently $0 because every line is at unit_cost=0. Once unit_costs are populated from the cost-DB or hand-pricing, the model_dump shape will match exports/calibration_v3/estimate.json. The owner-furnished lines (FP, CBORD devices, default AV/data cable, Sec 27 10 00 alternate) remain at quantity=0 / unit_cost=0 by design. Total area in scope = 3,115 SF (verified from AF100). At a $135-$190/SF headline range, the total project envelope is $420K-$590K — see price-references.md for refined estimate.
